questions.question: In the module 'Mesures de proximite', which statement best defines distance euclidienne?

choices.A: distance euclidienne is a foundational idea in apprentissage non supervisé used to understand mesures de proximite.
choices.B: distance cosinus is a foundational idea in apprentissage non supervisé used to understand mesures de proximite.
choices.C: normalisation is a foundational idea in apprentissage non supervisé used to understand mesures de proximite.
choices.D: voisinage is a foundational idea in apprentissage non supervisé used to understand mesures de proximite.

questions.explanation: distance euclidienne is correctly defined by the first option because it captures the core idea used in mesures de proximite.
